article_meta.title: Venezuelan Political Crisis Trump declares 'Venezuelan regime' a foreign terrorist organization, orders oil tanker block

reasoning: The model leans on outlet identity and quoted Trump rhetoric as evidence (attribution violations) and sets an overconfident 0.95. While the Right direction is plausible, evidence should come from the author's prose and structural choices, not quotes.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article’s structure is one-sided and uncritical, consistent with Right/Lean Right; labeling it Right is at worst one class off.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.95 is too high for bias signaled mainly by omission/uncritical sourcing rather than loaded authorial prose; strong but not unequivocal.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Relies on quoted phrases ('illegitimate Maduro Regime', 'weak and inept Biden Administration') and outlet identity instead of the author’s own prose/structure, violating the attribution rule.
